Report.title: Citizen Service Report
Report.description: Fragmented or raw public service reporting filed by citizens, enriched by AI contradiction-checking and verification scoring.

id.description: Unique identifier of the citizen report.

title.description: Short title or summary of the issue.

description.description: Detailed description of the service issue, failure, or disruption.

department.description: Category of public utility or infrastructure. E.g., Electricity, Water, Roads, Public Transport, Telecom, Health.

status.description: The current verification and audit workflow status.

contradictionDetected.description: True if Gemini detected a contradiction between this report and historical or official service declarations.

aiVerificationScore.description: Trustworthiness and reliability value parsed by the Gemini auditing backend (0 - 100).

aiAnalysis.description: Detailed multi-source contradiction and verification log parsed by the AI.

Disruption.title: Public Disruption Event
Disruption.description: Infrastructure, grid, or service disruption records verified by historical logs or official agencies.

description.description: Detailed description of the disruption scope.

reliabilityIndex.description: A composite index based on density of conforming citizen reports vs official channels.

contradictionNotes.description: Discrepancy audit notes compiled by Bharat Pulse AI comparing government releases and local realities.

isActive.description: Whether the disruption is currently causing an outage or is ongoing.

Prediction.title: Predictive Disruption Model
Prediction.description: AI-modeled risk forecasting of public service disruptions, combining seasonal weather data, citizen report trends, and historic maintenance cycles.

forecastReasoning.description: The explanatory rationalization generated by the Gemini intelligence model.

/reports/{reportId}.description: Submissions filed by verified citizens detailing infrastructure and utility concerns.

/disruptions/{disruptionId}.description: Validated service events detailing active grid down times, power outages or route delays.

/predictions/{predictionId}.description: Predictive outage forecasts generated by the back-end AI models.
